title: Tips & Strategy

description: Practical tactics for improving score consistency and reducing avoidable mistakes in ZXSnake.

sections.heading: Tips & Strategy
paragraphs: Practical tactics for improving score consistency and reducing avoidable mistakes in ZXSnake.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake tips and strategy
featureShowcases.summary: Tips help players turn the basic ZXSnake loop into more consistent play.
body: This matters because improvement is easier when players understand what to watch during a session: timing, positioning, risk, scoring opportunities, and when to reset their approach.
Players use this page before or after a run to find practical habits they can apply immediately.
bullets: Connects strategy to game modes and leaderboards.
Avoids filler by tying advice to real play decisions.

image.caption: ZXSnake tips artwork supports practical improvement guidance.
